
<!-- 

Find and replace:

- 8 : week number (numeral only)
- %CL% : class number (if needed -- per week, numeral only)
- %DATE% : date in format Monday, January 1, 2025
- Feb-24; Feb-26 -- for multiple dates
- Data Reporting Essentials : brief title/topic of the class meeting

TODO: see if there's a way to make these variables
The problem is that if they are includes with multiple on the index page, the variables would need to process before being included. 

-->

<!--

Text to appear before the accordion

-->

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#week-8 .accordion}

:::: accordion-item
::: {.accordion-header .titlebox}
Week 8 | Data Reporting, Part 2
:::
::::

:::: accordion-item
::: datebox
Feb-24; Feb-26
:::
::::

::::::: accordion-item
:::: accordion-header
::: {.accordion-button .collapsed .overview type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#overview-week-8" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="overview-week-8"}
**Overview**
:::
::::


:::: {#overview-week-8 .accordion-collapse .collapse data-bs-parent="#week-8"}
::: accordion-body

**Class plans:**

We're playing it by ear for the last two weeks due to the cancellation of D2M-R II next quarter. In general, I'm opening things up to the class to decide what would be most useful in two respects:

1. What do you need to get what you wanted out of *this quarter's* material?
2. What would be helpful to preview out of *next quarter's* materials?

There is an ongoing poll on the Slack Announcements channel to vote on #2. Summarized:

1. Data analysis: descriptive stats
2. Data analysis: hypothesis testing
3. Reporting: publication-quality tables
4. Reporting: publication-quality ggplots
5. Reporting: dynamic code and value reference
6. Publication: more markdown & quarto features
7. Publication: bibtex, inline citations, references pages
8. Publication: apaquarto extension

During week 8, we will *definitely*:

1. Review ggplot2 basics
2. Introduce overviews of common descriptive statistics and hypothesis testing

**Primary learning objectives:** May vary, but most likely...

-   (1) RStudio + Quarto workflow
-   (7) Data manipulation with `dplyr` and pipelines
-   (11) Factors with forcats
-   (12) Basic reporting: plots and descriptives in Quarto


:::
::::
:::::::

::::::: accordion-item
:::: accordion-header
::: {.accordion-button .collapsed .materials type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#materials-week-8" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="materials-week-8"}
**Materials & Resources** 
:::
::::

:::: {#materials-week-8 .accordion-collapse .collapse data-bs-parent="#week-8"}
::: accordion-body

**Class Materials:**

-   Results memo
    -   [Example results memo](https://github.com/d2m-r/student-hub/blob/main/demos/results-memo-penguins.qmd)
    -   [Results memo template](https://github.com/d2m-r/student-hub/blob/main/demos/results-memo-template.qmd)
-   Statistics walkthroughs
    -   [Descriptive statistics](https://github.com/d2m-r/student-hub/blob/main/demos/stats-demo-descriptive.qmd)
    -   [Predictive statistics](https://github.com/d2m-r/student-hub/blob/main/demos/stats-demo-predictive.qmd)

<!-- software, tools, datasets, etc -->

**Additional Resources:**

- readings
- cheat-sheets
- tutorials

:::
::::
:::::::


::::::: accordion-item
:::: accordion-header
::: {.accordion-button .collapsed .todo type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#todo-week-8" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="todo-week-8"}
**Assignments & To-Do** 
:::
::::

:::: {#todo-week-8 .accordion-collapse .collapse data-bs-parent="#week-8"}
::: accordion-body

**Next steps:**

1. Complete core objectives projects, keeping in mind the goal you set for yourself in your accountability plan.
2. **Submit your final accountability check-in** by next Monday, February 23.
3. Submit a draft of your IDP soon to ensure timely feedback for another revision.

:::
::::
:::::::


::::::: accordion-item
:::: accordion-header
::: {.accordion-button .collapsed .misc type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#misc-week-8" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="misc-week-8"}
**Housekeeping** 
:::
::::

:::: {#misc-week-8 .accordion-collapse .collapse data-bs-parent="#week-8"}
::: accordion-body

**Announcements:**

**D2M-R II will no longer be offered in Spring 2026.** This is due to an unfortunate, unavoidable, and unpredictable scheduling conflict that arose very recently. I'm making every effort to be available to any students who had intended to take D2M-R II next quarter, including (if there is interest) a working group for continued development of data reporting skills using R and Quarto.

:::
::::
:::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
